---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug

---

## Describe the bug
A clear, concise description of what's wrong.

## To reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Screenshots / logs
If applicable, paste terminal output or screenshots. **Redact any API keys.**

## Environment
- OS:
- Node version (`node -v`):
- AI provider in use (claude-cli / anthropic / openai-compatible + which):
- Deploy (local dev / Fly / other):

## Scraping issue?
If a scrape returned 0 reviews, the Web Store DOM selectors may have drifted — see CONTRIBUTING.md.
Note the extension URL/ID you were fetching.
